mapper.select: SELECT dt.type AS type, dd.label AS dd_label, dd.value AS dd_value FROM sys_dict_type dt LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data dd ON dt.id = dd.type_id

SELECT dt.id, dt.type, dt.name, dt.description, dt.created_at, creator.username AS creator, dt.updated_at, COALESCE(updater.username, 'Unknown') AS updater FROM sys_dict_type dt LEFT JOIN sys_user creator ON dt.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN sys_user updater ON dt.updated_by = updater.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
